name: Brie En Croate
recipeIngredient: 1 Pastry dough-pie shell/puff pastry, to fit Brie
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely enclose the cheese in the pastry.
2. Make an egg wash by mixing the egg and milk.
3. Place the Brie on a baking sheet with the seam side of the dough down.
4. Brush the Brie with the egg wash.
5. Cut decorative pieces from scraps of pastry, such as leaves or flowers.
6. Decorate the top of the Brie with the cutouts.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
